task_updates.executor_notes: Added the admin success-DM sibling in `PaymentCog` without changing `_dm_admin_payment_failure`. `PaymentCog.__init__` now reads `ADMIN_PAYMENT_SUCCESS_DM_THRESHOLD_USD` and `ADMIN_PAYMENT_SUCCESS_DM_PROVIDERS` so both construction sites stay in sync without touching the `setup()` hook. `_handle_terminal_payment` now gates the success DM on `status == 'confirmed'`, `not is_test`, provider membership in `_admin_success_dm_providers`, and `float(payment.get('amount_usd') or 0) >= self._admin_success_dm_threshold_usd`. `_dm_admin_payment_success` uses the required `✅ **Payment Completed**` prefix, includes both token and USD amounts, redacts the wallet with `_redact_wallet`, and omits any manual-review language. Verified with `python -m py_compile src/features/payments/payment_cog.py` and `PYTHONPATH=. pytest tests/test_admin_payments.py tests/test_social_publish_service.py tests/test_scheduler.py`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.acknowledgment: Verified `PaymentCog.__init__` reads the success-DM env vars, `_handle_terminal_payment` gates on confirmed + non-test + provider membership + `payment.get('amount_usd')` threshold, `_dm_admin_payment_success` exists with the exact `✅ **Payment Completed**` prefix and no manual-review line, and `_dm_admin_payment_failure` was left unchanged.
